calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-108 sec-7 learned-gating 2x2 falsifier (learned w_chan x learned W_lat settling) on the GAP-A foraging substrate
items.note: ARC-108 sec-7 SELECTION 2x2 learned-gating falsifier (design-of-record dopamine_into_gating_design_2026-06-22.md sec 5). The next MECH-439 (F-dominance) attack: does a LEARNED signed-RPE-driven per-channel selection weight (ARC-108 w_chan) and/or a learned recurrent lateral-inhibition settling step (MECH-450 W_lat) CONVERT committed-action-class diversity where the PURE-ARITHMETIC envelope plateaus? 5 arms: A0 envelope-only / A1 learned-w_chan / A2 learned-W_lat-settling / A3 both + ARM_NOISE verified-lifting matched-noise temperature control. The landed arithmetic envelope (use_f_eligibility_demotion + use_f_eligibility_adaptive_floor + use_go_nogo_constitution + modulatory-authority/top_k shortlist) is a MATCHED CONSTANT on all arms (exactly as V3-EXQ-699); the ONLY toggled flags are use_learned_channel_gating x use_learned_settling_step. C1 conversion (committed-class entropy strict-above A0 AND noise on >=2/3 seeds) + C2 learning-load-bearing (grows over training + w_chan/W_lat moved from init). C3 signed-vs-unsigned-RPE ablation DEFERRED to a substrate flag (no runtime knob; user-confirmed 2026-06-22). Non-vacuity self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue if pool not divergent / delta_t flat / weights never move / noise control not lifting; preconditions-met no-lift routes to V4 full-loop scope bet (NOT a false ARC-107 weakening). experiment_purpose=evidence. PROMOTES NOTHING until it scores (MECH-439 substrate_ceiling + ARC-108/MECH-450 substrate_conditional => promote/demote suppressed). Validator OK; dry-run smoke exit 0 self-routed substrate_not_ready at toy scale; wiring probe confirmed both flags engage (settling 60/60 ticks, w_chan+W_lat moved, delta_t non-flat). RE-DERIVE BRAKE EXEMPT (Step 2.5b, verify-then-ignore): NOT a same-granularity lettered re-test of the arithmetic-envelope lineage -- it is a NEW EXQ NUMBER testing a DIFFERENT mechanism (LEARNED, signed-RPE-driven gating: ARC-108 w_chan + MECH-450 W_lat; claim_ids ADD ARC-108/MECH-450), the explicit 'learned-NOT-arithmetic' attack on MECH-439 per dopamine_into_gating_design_2026-06-22.md. The required upstream substrate IS built: ARC-108 JOB-1 step-1 (ree-v3 ae907b5) + MECH-450 step-2 (ree-v3 9839492018), both documented IMPLEMENTED 2026-06-22 in ree-v3/CLAUDE.md. The 3 prior MECH-439 autopsies (689/689a/f-dominance-cluster) circled the arithmetic-envelope levers (MECH-447/448/449), a DIFFERENT mechanism class than learned gating.

items.title: P-comp: MECH-448 demotion x MECH-449 Go/No-Go composition at committed-class entropy (2x2 diagnostic)
items.note: conversion_ceiling_campaign:P-comp prong (prong map node P-comp; user decision 2026-06-22). 2x2 (use_f_eligibility_demotion {OFF,ON} x use_go_nogo_constitution {OFF,ON}) over a matched stack on the arc_062 GAP-B bank; swept variable = LEVER COMBINATION (NOT use_candidate_rule_field, which is a matched constant True). use_f_eligibility_adaptive_floor (689e) + use_dacc + top_k shortlist scaffold + 643a authority/routing + MECH-341 + SD-056 + trained lateral_pfc bias head + matured CRF pool all matched constants. PRIMARY DV committed-class entropy (C2). Characterizes whether MECH-448 demotion and MECH-449 Go/No-Go COMPOUND or CANCEL when co-armed (Factor A x Factor B CANCELLED at 689a; this pair UNKNOWN). Per-arm conditional readiness: C1e demotion-live on demotion-armed arms (ARM_DEM/ARM_BOTH), C1f No-Go-live on gng-armed arms (ARM_GNG/ARM_BOTH). 3-way verdict levers_compound/levers_cancel/levers_neutral; readiness-unmet or bit-identical-arms self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue. experiment_purpose=diagnostic; claim_ids=[MECH-448,MECH-449] context only (scoring-excluded); PROMOTES NOTHING. Re-derive-brake EXEMPT: tests lever COMPOSITION (distinct question), not a GAP-B same-lever letter, not a Factor-B test; both levers 0 substrate_ceiling autopsies + face-validated (689d/689g/689e PASS). Runnable now (built+face-validated levers only). Feeds conversion_ceiling_campaign:FULLSTACK composition-readiness gate. validate_experiments --strict OK; dry-run smoke PASS (4 arms end-to-end, exit 0, toy-scale self-routes substrate_not_ready as designed).

items.title: rung-6 commit/release-DURATION lever on the BUILT closure-exclusive de-commit eval substrate (supersedes 460j)
items.note: f_dominance_conversion_ceiling rung-6 (commit/release-DURATION face) retest on the now-BUILT closure-exclusive de-commit eval substrate. Sets closure_exclusive_decommit_eval=True (+ required use_closure_commit_beta_coupling=True + use_natural_commit_latch_hold=True) on EVERY arm (the BUILT flag, ree-v3 main e52158d 2026-06-22; the named dissociable substrate from the 460j park). Beta elevation is closure-EXCLUSIVE (_commit_for_beta=_closure_commit_active only; fragile F-driven result.committed suppressed) AND the latch-hold arms on the closure-coupled commit, so the ARM_LEVER_OFF baseline now SUSTAINS a natural-commit occupancy via the closure plane (460j ARM_LEVER_OFF had reassert=0/armed=0 -> off_baseline_not_sustained). Re-states the rung-6 gates: (NEW gate 2.5) closure-exclusive eval ARMED the closure-coupled hold (ncl_hold_closure_armed_total + ncl_hold_reassert_total > 0 on ARM_LEVER_OFF >=2/3 seeds; the counters 460j had at 0); (gate 3) OFF baseline sustains (mean per-commit hold >= floor); (gate 4) ARM_GAP_SCALED rung-6 release SHORTENS the occupancy (ncur_n_releases_total>0 + >= LEVER_OCC_DROP_FRAC drop vs OFF); THEN MECH-445 commit-intent (sd034_n_closure_commit_intent>0) + MECH-446 within-arm occupancy-drop CO-OCCUR on the SAME seeds >=2/3. SEVEN readiness gates self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue when unmet -- NEVER a false MECH-445/446 weakening (incl. the new closure-exclusive-eval-armed gate). claim_ids=[MECH-446 scored (within-arm occupancy-drop), MECH-445 commit-intent precondition]; experiment_purpose=evidence; supersedes V3-EXQ-460j. MECH-445/446 stay candidate/standard/v3_pending/pending_retest_after_substrate -- PROMOTES NOTHING until it scores. re-derive brake RELEASED: the named upstream substrate (closure-exclusive de-commit eval mode) is now BUILT (substrate_queue f_dominance_conversion_ceiling fallback_ladder[5] rung 6 BUILT, build_record_460j; autopsies 460h/460i/460j braked it), so this is a meaningful retest on built substrate, NOT another letter circling the parked lever. Do NOT re-author 460d/e/f/g/h/i/j. validate_experiments --strict OK; dry-run smoke runs 4 arms end-to-end, exit 0, toy-scale self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (closure_exclusive_eval_did_not_arm_hold) as designed (no closures form on the toy substrate).

items.title: ARC-108 JOB-2 control-plane L0/L1/L2 falsifier (rho_t maintenance ramp + habenula de-commit DRIVER pair; supersedes 460k)
items.note: ARC-108 JOB-2 CONTROL-PLANE L0/L1/L2 falsifier (unified_dopamine_substrate_design_2026-06-22.md sec 7.2) -- the dopaminergic DRIVER pair (rho_t maintenance ramp + habenula negative-delta_t de-commit, BUILT ree-v3 main c5614ab 2026-06-22; doc docs/architecture/arc_108_job2_control_plane.md) on the now-BUILT closure-exclusive de-commit eval substrate (closure_exclusive_decommit_eval, ree-v3 main e52158d). DISTINCT from V3-EXQ-700 (the JOB-1 sec-7.1 SELECTION 2x2). SUPERSEDES V3-EXQ-460k (the rung-6 duration-lever falsifier): the JOB-2 pair is the biologically-faithful successor -- the rho ramp REPLACES the flat-hold maintenance driver (B6/460h fix: peaks-then-declines, cannot monopolise), the habenula ADDS a content-driven dissociable de-commit input to the SD-034 closure operator (the parked rung-6 non-dissociability fix done properly). 460k-lineage port (same scaffold + closure-exclusive eval substrate ON all arms + use_closure_commit_beta_coupling + use_natural_commit_latch_hold); rung-6 NaturalCommitUrgencyRelease OFF every arm (the rho ramp is the maintenance driver under test). THREE eval arms on one trained substrate per seed (driver pair toggled at clone): L0_FLAT_LATCH (rho OFF + habenula OFF = the monolithic-hold reference) / L1_RHO_RAMP (use_rho_maintenance_ramp, requires latch_hold) / L2_RHO_HABENULA (+ use_habenula_decommit, requires use_closure_operator<-use_lateral_pfc_analog; reuses the JOB-1 signed-RPE delta_t in post_action_update via the E3Config mirror). The eval loop CALLS agent.update_residue() each tick so the waking post-action path computes delta_t and fires the habenula (the new instrumentation vs 460k's frozen eval; dry-run confirms L2 n_neg_delta_ticks>0, dt_min<0). SIX readiness gates self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue when unmet -- NEVER a false weakens: contact guard, rule_bias trained, (3) closure-exclusive eval armed the hold (ncl_hold_closure_armed_total + ncl_hold_reassert_total > 0 on L0 = the 'dissociable eval mode arms' non-vacuity), (4) L0 monolithic baseline, (5) rho proximity variance (L1 rho_peak_max>floor + rho_n_releases_total>0), (6) delta_t negative variance (L2 n_neg_delta_ticks>=floor). Discriminators (>=2/3 seeds): D1 ramp self-limits where the flat latch monopolises (L1 bounded occupancy below L0 + committed-class entropy strict-above L0) / D2 release content-driven NOT a re-parameterised timer (L1 rho release-tick dispersion std>floor; the CORE discriminator -- 'releases sooner' is NOT the claim) / D3 habenula de-commit dissociable (L2 n_habenula_aborts>=1 on negative delta_t, dissociable from the refractory clock). A preconditions-met no-lift routes to JOB-1/selection (maintenance_not_binding_route_to_selection, non_contributory), NEVER a falsification of the ramp+habenula design. claim_ids=[MECH-090,MECH-342,MECH-445,MECH-446,ARC-108]; evidence_direction_per_claim emitted; experiment_purpose=evidence. PROMOTES NOTHING until it scores -- ARC-108 stays candidate/substrate_conditional/implementation_phase=v3; MECH-445/446 candidate/v3_pending; MECH-090/342 candidate. Do NOT re-author V3-EXQ-460k. validate_experiments --strict --paths OK; dry-run smoke runs 3 arms end-to-end, exit 0, toy-scale self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (closure_exclusive_eval_did_not_arm_hold) as designed (no closures form on the toy substrate); habenula delta_t path confirmed live (L2 n_neg_dt=35, dt_min=-0.101).

items.title: INV-050 MEL-measurability diagnostic: does graded waking novelty produce a measurable, monotonic accumulated prediction-error (Model Error Load) signal?
items.note: Commitment-free IV-precondition diagnostic for INV-050 (IGW-20260622-188 / EVB-0098). INV-050's directly-testable corollary MECH-180 (novelty adaptively upregulates the sleep learning drive) is substrate-BLOCKED: V3-EXQ-677 FAILed non_contributory+degenerate (autopsy failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-677_2026-06-14) because sleep counts are scheduler-pinned (zero cross-arm variance) AND the novelty manipulation never moved the prediction-error signal (8.8e-7). The adaptive sleep-cadence enrichment build is DEFERRED (user 2026-06-14), so the sleep DV is off-limits here. This probe tests ONLY the IV precondition the 677 autopsy flagged as the necessary next step: instrument MEL = accumulated per-step world-model prediction error and ask whether a GRADED waking novelty manipulation (env-drift levels NONE/LOW/MED/HIGH x 3 seeds) yields a measurable, MONOTONIC MEL signal. Fixes 677's measurement bug: reads the RAW per-step e3.post_action_update prediction_error (actual_z_world vs E2 one-step rollout; updated every step per ARC-016), accumulated over a FROZEN-model measurement window (no adaptation to wash out the transient) -- NOT the batch training loss 677 averaged. NO sleep machinery touched (commitment-free). experiment_purpose=diagnostic (excluded from governance confidence/conflict scoring). Readiness gate (R1 PE responds to a max-novelty shock as a RANGE -- same statistic C1 routes on; R2 P0 world model converged) self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue rather than a false verdict. Interpretation: C1 PASS -> MEL measurable+monotonic, the deferred sleep-cadence enrichment now has a non-vacuous IV and is worth building; C1 FAIL (substrate ready) -> MEL not modulated by env-drift novelty, need a stronger manipulation before building the enrichment (NOT a falsification of INV-050). RE-DERIVE BRAKE EXEMPT (Step 2.5b, verify-then-ignore): 0 substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsies tag INV-050 (the 677 autopsy tags MECH-180), and a commitment-free diagnostic that discriminates WHY the ceiling holds is explicitly not the re-derive loop. Validator OK (--strict --paths, 0 readiness/fingerprint/degeneracy warnings); dry-run smoke exit 0, correctly self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue at toy 2-episode scale. PROMOTES NOTHING.
